title: cuphea nivea
intro: Cuphea nivea is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae, commonly known as the white cuphea or powder puff bush due to its unique powdery white flowers. Cuphea nivea has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is also known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Cuphea nivea can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
